text.title: Secrets Rotation End-to-End Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Secrets Rotation End-to-End output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: rotation requires restart for any secret

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: secrets_inventory populated with a typed value
cadence_table populated with a typed value
dual_secret_window_hours populated with a typed value
reload_mechanism populated with a typed value
audit_trail_url populated with a typed value
emergency_runbook_url populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
